name: Dark Souls III
description: Dark souls III is an Action role-playing game and is part of the Souls series developed by FromSoftware.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Early Banner
options.description: Force Small Lothric Banner into an early sphere in your world or across all worlds.

options.label: Late Basin Of Vows
options.description: Guarantee that you don't need to enter Lothric Castle until later in the run.

options.label: Late Dlc
options.description: Guarantee that you don't need to enter the DLC until later in the run.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Enable Dlc
options.description: Include DLC locations, items, and enemies in the randomized pools.

options.label: Enable Ngp
options.description: Include items and locations exclusive to NG+ cycles.

options.label: Random Starting Loadout
options.description: Randomizes the equipment characters begin with.

options.label: Require One Handed Starting Weapons
options.description: Require starting equipment to be usable one-handed.

options.label: Auto Equip
options.description: Automatically equips any received armor or left/right weapons.

options.label: Lock Equip
options.description: Lock the equipment slots so you cannot change your armor or your left/right weapons.

options.label: No Equip Load
options.description: Disable the equip load constraint from the game.

options.label: No Weapon Requirements
options.description: Disable the weapon requirements by removing any movement or damage penalties, permitting you to use any weapon early.

options.label: No Spell Requirements
options.description: Disable the spell requirements permitting you to use any spell.

options.label: Randomize Infusion
options.description: Enable this option to infuse a percentage of the pool of weapons and shields.

options.label: Randomize Infusion Percentage
options.description: The percentage of weapons/shields in the pool to be infused if Randomize Infusion is toggled.

options.label: Randomize Weapon Level
options.description: Enable this option to upgrade a percentage of the pool of weapons to a random value between the minimum and maximum levels defined.

options.label: Randomize Weapon Level Percentage
options.description: The percentage of weapons in the pool to be upgraded if randomize weapons level is toggled.

options.label: Min Levels In 5
options.description: The minimum upgraded value of a weapon in the pool of weapons that can only reach +5.

options.label: Max Levels In 5
options.description: The maximum upgraded value of a weapon in the pool of weapons that can only reach +5.

options.label: Min Levels In 10
options.description: The minimum upgraded value of a weapon in the pool of weapons that can reach +10.

options.label: Max Levels In 10
options.description: The maximum upgraded value of a weapon in the pool of weapons that can reach +10.

options.label: Smooth Soul Items
options.description: Distribute soul items in a similar order as the base game.

options.label: Smooth Upgrade Items
options.description: Distribute upgrade items in a similar order as the base game.

options.label: Smooth Upgraded Weapons
options.description: Distribute upgraded weapons in a similar order as the base game.

options.label: Randomize Enemies
options.description: Randomize enemy and boss placements.

options.label: Simple Early Bosses
options.description: Avoid replacing Iudex Gundyr and Vordt with difficult bosses.

options.label: Scale Enemies
options.description: Scale randomized enemy stats to match the areas in which they appear.

options.label: Randomize Mimics With Enemies
options.description: Mix Mimics into the main enemy pool.

options.label: Randomize Small Crystal Lizards With Enemies
options.description: Mix small Crystal Lizards into the main enemy pool.

options.label: Reduce Harmless Enemies
options.description: Reduce the frequency that "harmless" enemies appear.

options.label: All Chests Are Mimics
options.description: Replace all chests with mimics that drop the same items.

options.label: Impatient Mimics
options.description: Mimics attack as soon as you get close instead of waiting for you to open them.

options.label: Excluded Location Behavior
options.description: How to choose items for excluded locations in DS3.

options.label: Missable Location Behavior
options.description: Which items can be placed in locations that can be permanently missed.
